input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.1.3
            TITLE: the accumulator containers and mounting systems are subject to approval during ses review

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.1.3: The Accumulator Containers and mounting systems are subject to approval during SES review
F.10.1.3 The Accumulator Containers and mounting systems are subject to approval during SES review 
and Technical Inspection

final_answer: The Accumulator Containers and mounting systems are subject to approval during SES review and Technical Inspection
